summary: Do not ship: RL-2, RL-3, and RL-4 are adequately fixed, but RL-1 remains only partially release-verified against its explicit browser acceptance criteria.
triage: review-gate SKILL.md rules govern: render EVERY finding as a full table row, the human decides each row (accept/reject/defer/question — free text), echo back before applying, max 2 rounds, append decisions.md and COMMIT it with this artifact.

findings.title: RL-1 browser evidence covers only half of the required Cookie operations
findings.body: Issue 03 requires real-browser verification of Cookie append, whole-header replacement, and removal, plus Set-Cookie append, replacement, and blocking. The new smoke suite exercises only Cookie append and Set-Cookie append; replacement/removal paths exist only as compiler-shape unit tests. Consequently, the claimed 44/44 browser evidence can pass even if Chromium rejects or behaves differently for four required DNR operations. This is especially material because RL-1 was originally raised for the entire missing slice and the issue explicitly names real-browser validation as acceptance criteria.
findings.recommendation: Add real-browser smoke cases for Cookie whole-header replacement and removal, and Set-Cookie replacement and blocking. Assert both replacement of pre-existing values and absence after removal/blocking, then rerun and commit the updated verification evidence.

next_steps: Extend the issue 03 smoke coverage for the four missing Cookie/Set-Cookie operations.
Rerun the full browser smoke suite and update verification.md with the resulting evidence.
